query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `deliverables` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`code` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
	`mission` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
	`category` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`contractualDelay` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
	`referenceDate` bigint,
	`dueDate` bigint,
	`deliveredDate` bigint,
	`status` enum('a_venir','en_cours','livre','en_retard','non_applicable') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'a_venir',
	`responsable` varchar(200),
	`notes` text,
	`alertDaysBefore` int DEFAULT 7,
	`alertSent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`priority` enum('haute','moyenne','basse') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'moyenne',
	`updatedBy` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `deliverables_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
